headline: Decentralized AI: Distributed Inference, Peer-to-Peer Networks, and Blockchain Integration
description: Decentralized AI reimagines how AI systems are built, trained, and served — distributing computation across peer-to-peer networks instead of centralized data centers. Combining federated learning, blockchain incentives, and DePIN GPU networks, decentralized AI promises democratized access, censorship resistance, and elimination of cloud monopolies.

citation.name: Toward Decentralized Intelligence: A Systematic Review of Decentralized AI
A Review on Building Blocks of Decentralized Artificial Intelligence (SLR of 71 studies)
